name: jacobcxdev-cc-plugins
description: A collection of useful Claude Code plugins by JacobCXDev

plugins.name: model-matchmaker
plugins.description: Effort-aware prompt classification for Claude Code. Classifies prompt complexity and injects effort guidance so Claude adapts reasoning depth to task difficulty.

plugins.name: cc-skills
plugins.description: Claude Code skills: reverse engineering with Hopper Disassembler (auto-detect architecture, single-instance XPC management, binary-size-scaled timeout).
